scope_summary.problem: requirements.md: Need an importable `builtins` module that exposes all existing runtime builtins as module attributes.
scope_summary.success_criteria: import builtins succeeds; builtins.print, builtins.len, etc. are callable; constants True, False, None are accessible; all listed functions map to existing mb_* runtime implementations.

boundary.in_scope: Create builtins_mod.rs following future_mod.rs/main_mod.rs pattern; register dispatch wrappers for all listed functions; register constants; wire into mod.rs and register_stdlib().
boundary.out_of_scope: No new runtime function implementations needed; no changes to the type checker or lowering pipeline; no new dependencies.
boundary.constraints: Must use NATIVE_FUNC_ADDRS for callable dispatch wrappers (functools_mod.rs pattern). Must not break existing tests.
